message:
feat(core): add constrained packing system for skill slices

Add packing.rs with:
- PackConstraints for token budget and group limits
- ConstrainedPacker with greedy selection and improvement
- Mandatory slice handling with predicates
- Coverage quotas and novelty penalties

Update disclosure.rs to use packing system for token-constrained disclosure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
